data.user_prompt: Find a Louisville therapist who accepts Medicaid.
data.system_message: Answer as a local-search assistant for a person in Louisville, Kentucky. Prefer current local providers and cite source URLs when available.
data.tag: lmhg llm response perplexity Find a Louisville therapist who accepts Medicaid.

sections.text:
Here are several **Louisville therapists and clinics** that accept **Medicaid** and are currently welcoming new clients:

### 1. **Kentucky Counseling Center (KCC) – Louisville**
- **Accepts:** Medicaid, Anthem, Passport, Molina, Aetna, Humana, United, Cigna, and more  
- **Services:** Counseling, psychiatry, medication management, case management  
- **Wait Time:** No long wait times  
- **Phone:** Call to request an appointment online  
- **Website:** [kentuckycounselingcenter.com](https://kentuckycounselingcenter.com/kentucky-counseling-center/louisville/) [5]

### 2. **Louisville Mental Health Group**
- **Accepts:** All Medicaid plans (Passport, WellCare, Aetna Better Health, Anthem, Cigna, etc.)  
- **Services:** Individual, child/adolescent, teen group, disordered eating group therapy  
- **Status:** Welcoming new clients of all ages  
- **Founded:** 2016 by Stacey Mattingly-Neal, Tyler Horn, Kim Sullivan  
- **Website:** [louisvillementalhealth.org](https://louisvillementalhealth.org) [6]

### 3. **Norton Behavioral Medicine (Telehealth)**
- **Accepts:** Medicaid, Medicare, most commercial insurance  
- **Services:** Therapists, psychologists, psychiatrists, addiction specialists  
- **Format:** Secure telehealth for KY and Indiana residents  
- **Website:** [nortonhealthcare.com](https://nortonhealthcare.com/services-and-conditions/behavioral-health/specialists/) [7]

### 4. **Individual Therapists via Psychology Today (Medicaid Category)**
- **Alisha Blais**, LCSW – Online only; accepts Aetna Better Health, Passport Molina, UHC Community Plan, WellCare [1]  
- **Danni E. Lee**, LCSW – In-network with KY Medicaid and all major insurances [1]  
- **Daniel**, LPCA – Takes Medicaid, Anthem BCBS, private pay [1]  
- **Rev. Maria Cristal Encarnación**, MAMFT – Part of group accepting Medicaid plans [1]  
- **A. R. Ward**, LCADC – Part of group practice accepting Medicaid [1]  
- **Website:** [psychologytoday.com](https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/therapists/ky/louisville?category=medicaid) [1]

### 5. **Lifestance Health** (Community Report)
- **Reported to accept Medicaid** and still accepting new patients  
- **Source:** Reddit user in Louisville [4]  
- **Note:** Verify directly with the clinic before scheduling

---

💡 **Important Tip:** Before starting therapy, **verify your Medicaid coverage** for behavioral health by calling the customer service number on your insurance card. Some plans may not cover outpatient therapy [2].

For the fastest access, consider starting with **Kentucky Counseling Center** or **Louisville Mental Health Group**, both noted for **no long wait times** and **broad Medicaid acceptance** [5][6].
